column.text:
• Toronto Blue Jays placed RHP Max Scherzer on the 15-day injured list with back spasms.
• Detroit Tigers placed 2B Gleyber Torres on the 10-day injured list with a left oblique strain.
• Chicago Cubs placed RHP Edward Cabrera on the 15-day injured list with a left hamstring strain.
• Los Angeles Angels designated first baseman Trey Mancini for assignment.
• Atlanta Braves designated veteran RHP Carlos Carrasco for assignment.
• New York Mets activated shortstop Francisco Lindor from the 10-day injured list.
• The Detroit Tigers activated RHP Casey Mize from the 15-day injured list.
• The New York Mets also activated infielder Ronny Mauricio from the 10-day injured list.

x_article.title: MLB Daily Recap
